hooks.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; \$p = New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; \$p.Volume = 0.3; \$p.Open([uri]('file:///' + \$env:USERPROFILE.Replace('\','/') + '/.claude/sounds/stop.wav')); \$p.Play(); \$b = New-BTBinding -Children (New-BTText -Text 'ClaudeCode'),(New-BTText -Text 'The process is complete'); \$c = New-BTContent -Visual (New-BTVisual -BindingGeneric \$b) -Audio (New-BTAudio -Silent); Submit-BTNotification -Content \$c; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"
powershell -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; New-BurntToastNotification -Text 'ClaudeCode', 'API error occurred' -Sound Default"

powershell -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Command "Import-Module BurntToast; Add-Type -AssemblyName presentationCore; \$p = New-Object System.Windows.Media.MediaPlayer; \$p.Volume = 0.3; \$p.Open([uri]('file:///' + \$env:USERPROFILE.Replace('\','/') + '/.claude/sounds/notification-permission_prompt.wav')); \$p.Play(); \$b = New-BTBinding -Children (New-BTText -Text 'ClaudeCode'),(New-BTText -Text 'Claude Code has requested confirmation'); \$c = New-BTContent -Visual (New-BTVisual -BindingGeneric \$b) -Audio (New-BTAudio -Silent); Submit-BTNotification -Content \$c; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"
